messages.subject: [R] Seemingly unrelated regressions
messages.body_plain:
> Is there an implementation of SUR in R?
> These are used commonly in economics.
> Thanks
> 
> -- 
> Richard A. Hinrichsen

You can use the function 'sur' in the library 'systemfit'.

Masaei Sato
